title: Yennamma Ippadi Panreenglemma Lyrics Rajini Murugan Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Rajini Murugan Yennamma Ippadi Panreenglemma Song Lyrics
Singer: D Imman
Movie: Rajini Murugan
Lyrics:Yugabharathi

vaadi vaadi vaadi
en Tamizhoda thirumagale
enga ammaavoda marumagale
 yennaadi nenachittu irukka
love panra maari
pesuveengalaam
love panra maari
pazhaguveengalaam
ippo
enga appaavukku pidikkalai
enga aattukuttiku pudikkalai
scena potta aaiii
enaku nyayam
kedaichaaganumdi aii

ennada thanniya pottu vandhu
thagaraaru panreeya.
pinna sarbaththa kudichitta
thagaraaru pannuvaanga.

mariyaathayaa poidunga
illa policea koopuduven

yennamma,
ippadi panreenglemma.(4)

Kaththirippoo dhaavani
katti vandha mohini.
kithaappa kaatturaale
enna sekkaattam aatturaale.

alli poovaa sirichava
asin pola nadichava
appan pecha kekkuraale
enna akku akkaah
paekkuraale.

potta pulla vanappa kaati
ponaa usura sundi.
adha enni manasu noga
aanen sarakku vandi

yennamma
ippadi panreenglemma (4)

valavi vaanga pogayile
valanji valanji kuduthava.
kolusu vaanga pogayile
kulungi kulungi kudhichava.

podava vaanga pogayile
ponadhenna thalli,
naa purusanaaga pogayile
poduraale kolli.

mugaththuku naalum
poosinaaalae powder-u.
nerukkathil azhaga rasikka
pona murder-u.

hair pinnu benda pola
enna avalum akkitta.
borewell motoraye
nenja kodanju pottuttaa.

yennamma
ippadi panreenglemma (4)

nalavu poondi vaangi thara
kalanga kalanga adichava.
kadal mittaai vaangi thara
kavidha kavidha padichavan.

nagaththa pola kadhalayum
veesuraale vetti.
naan sedharu thaenga pola aaga
oduraale yetti.

panapetti pola kanni
manasa poottittaa
karichatti pola enna
kaluvi ooththittaa.

pallikoodam pogum podhu
paartha paarva marakkala.
satta mela patta inka
innum kooda thuvaikkala.

yennamma
ippadi panreenglemma!!!

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song captures the playful and humorous aspects of love, showcasing how young couples communicate in a light-hearted manner.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In Rajini Murugan, this song highlights the protagonist's charming personality and his interactions with love interests, adding a fun element to the storyline.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is composed by D Imman, while the lyrics are penned by Yugabharathi. The singer is currently unknown.

When was the song released?

Yennamma Ippadi Panreenglemma was released on June 1, 2015.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Yennamma Ippadi Panreenglemma, the lively beats and playful lyrics create a joyous atmosphere that resonates with the youthful spirit of love. The song serves as a backdrop to the protagonist's charming antics in Rajini Murugan, reflecting the light-hearted nature of romantic relationships. With its catchy tune and energetic vibe, it evokes feelings of happiness and celebration, making it a perfect choice for festive occasions.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Yennamma Ippadi Panreenglemma from Rajini Murugan is a vibrant celebration of love and fun, perfectly encapsulating the spirit of youthful exuberance. With D Imman's catchy composition and Yugabharathi's playful lyrics, this song is bound to get you on your feet. Experience the infectious energy that makes this track a must-listen for any party playlist!
stanzaMeanings: Come on, come on, my Tamil bride, what are you doing? Are you talking like you're in love? Are you acting like you're in love? Now, our fathers don't like it, and our family doesn't like it either. If a scene is created, I need to get justice.
What are you doing, pouring water and making noise? After that, if you drink a drink, you'll make noise.
Please go away, or I'll call the police.
What are you doing, come on like this.
When the wind blows, a beautiful charm comes. When you show it, what kind of dance is that?
Are you laughing like a flower? Are you dancing like a fool? When dad speaks, what do I say? When my sister speaks, what do I say?
If a boy shows up, he will take away your money. I felt like my heart was hurt by that.
What are you doing, come on like this.
When the money comes, it will be given in a hurry. When the anklet comes, it will be worn in a hurry.
When I go, what will happen? I will push you away, I will go as a man.
If you keep powdering your face, it will look good. If you look beautiful, it will be like a murder.
Like hair, she is also like that. The borewell motor is making my heart ache.
What are you doing, come on like this.
When you take the money, you will create a fuss. When you take the sea candy, you will read poetry.
Like a snake, love will blow. I will run like a cow.
Like a coin, the girl's heart is broken. Like a pot, what kind of trouble is this?
When the school bell rings, don't forget to look. Even after the game, there is still more to play.
What are you doing, come on like this!
